framework.name: Dog That Didn't Bark — No Production Failures Published
framework.description: Your meta-observation is the real finding: the OpenID Foundation, with 20+ contributors from WorkOS, Stanford, and enterprise identity vendors, frames recursive delegation entirely as a FUTURE risk. Zero references to actual incidents. This strongly supports gap_3 — nobody is doing multi-hop delegation in production yet.
framework.raw_quote: Near-term development of highly capable autonomous systems will continue to create new challenges and questions regarding authorization and authentication for AI agents.
